title: DLR: Unfair Labor Practice (Prohibited Practice) Procedures
description: Chapter of the Massachusetts Public Employee Collective Bargaining Law Guide (DLR) explaining the procedural path for filing and litigating prohibited-practice charges under M.G.L. c.150E — pre-filing assistance, charge preparation, service, investigation, hearings, and remedies.
notes: KEY DEADLINE: a prohibited-practice charge must be filed within SIX MONTHS from when the Charging Party knew or should have known of the alleged practice (M.G.L. c.150E), absent good cause. Large file (~67 KB); head sampled.
